title: aralia longifolia
intro: Aralia longifolia, also known as Chinese angelica tree, is a type of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aralia longifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine preparations such as tinctures and poultices.
